project_type: Python research prototype - Virtual SIA cognitive agent with concept formation, evaluation framework, and cognitive economy
build_system: No build system currently. Pure Python package with no pyproject.toml/setup.py/requirements.txt. No external dependencies - all stdlib.
test_framework: No test framework currently. No tests/ directory. Will add pytest.
verification_instructions: 1. Import virtual_sia successfully with Python 3.12. 2. Run eval runners to verify no import/runtime errors. 3. Run pytest on new tests.
snapshot_or_generated_files: virtual_sia/eval/results/*.json - generated by eval runners. These are checked in.
setup_instructions: Use ~/.pyenv/versions/3.12.13/bin/python (the system python3 is 3.9 and incompatible). No pip install needed - pure stdlib.
environment_constraints: Must use ~/.pyenv/versions/3.12.13/bin/python. Network is OPEN_INTERNET. No external dependencies needed - all stdlib.
contribution_requirements: Project is in 'Stabilize & Package' phase (Option B from Decision Memo). No new runtime planes. Focus on consolidation, cleanup, family-specific selectivity, and packaging.
key_patterns: 1. All data objects inherit from BaseObject with slots=True dataclasses. 2. Eval runners use compare_conditions() with CONDITIONS dict. 3. Concept selectivity uses family-specific policies in config.py applied via _family_policy() in apply.py. 4. Bug: run_selectivity_ablation.py references concept_config.DEFAULT_MAX_ACTIVE_CONCEPTS which does not exist (should be DEFAULT_GLOBAL_MAX_ACTIVE_CONCEPTS). 5. The retriever.py caps selected concepts using DEFAULT_GLOBAL_MAX_ACTIVE_CONCEPTS globally after per-family selection.
directory_structure: virtual_sia/ - main package. virtual_sia/core/objects/ - data models (BaseObject, ConceptCard, TaskCase, etc). virtual_sia/core/ontology/ - enums. virtual_sia/runtime/ - services (concept_engine, task_ingress, memory_os, pipeline, etc). virtual_sia/eval/ - evaluation (runners/, task_sets/, perturbations/, reports/, results/). Root has ~80 Arabic markdown docs with specifications and memos.
